style_tips_by_skin_tone.fair: Lean into cool and deep tones like navy, emerald, and burgundy to create beautiful contrast. Pastels and soft pinks work for a romantic, ethereal look.
style_tips_by_skin_tone.light: Warm peaches, corals, and earthy neutrals enhance your natural glow. Avoid very pale pastels that might wash you out.
style_tips_by_skin_tone.medium: You can wear almost anything! Jewel tones like sapphire, emerald, and amethyst look especially radiant against your skin tone.
style_tips_by_skin_tone.olive: Rich earth tones — burnt sienna, camel, gold, and forest green — bring out the warmth in your complexion beautifully.
style_tips_by_skin_tone.deep: Bold and bright colors like cobalt, fuchsia, and vivid yellow create stunning contrast. White and gold are particularly striking choices.
